meaning: n.无赖,游民,游荡者,乞讨者
examples: I had a bummer of a day.
It's a real bummer that she can't come.
Given all this, they did not exactly need their art to be a bummer too.
Seeing your star employees being poached by a rival always seems a bit of a bummer.
Unfortunately, the machine on display was running Windows 7, not 8, which is a bummer.
